file-read.description: Read explicitly targeted project files; deny directory listing, search, writes, and unclassified shell commands.

project-read.description: Read and search projectRoot; deny writes, external paths, and unclassified shell commands.

wide-read.description: Read and search anywhere on the filesystem; deny writes, mutations, and unclassified shell commands. Blocked paths (secrets, keys, .git internals) are always denied and cannot be relaxed.

plan.description: Read and search anywhere; write only docs/ and root CONTEXT.md. Blocked paths are always denied.

inspect.description: Read and search anywhere; write project docs/ and /tmp/ for downloading and reviewing external code. Mutations and unclassified commands require one-time approval. No source-tree writes.

safe-write.description: Read and search projectRoot; write only source and test paths. Mutations and unclassified commands require one-time approval.

project-write.description: Read and search anywhere; write project files. Known mutations are allowed and unclassified commands require approval. Blocked paths and .git are always denied.

guarded-write.description: Read and search anywhere; write project files. Every known mutation and unclassified shell command requires one-time approval. Blocked paths and .git are always denied.
